content: Worth naming as a pattern to watch (not yet an EC, occurrence count 1): a staged proposal's own draft content can itself repeat a mistake the same proposal set warned against elsewhere (proposal-2's draft pointing at the wrong marketplace twin, something proposal-3's rationale explicitly called out as the failure mode to avoid). Checker caught it here at apply-time rather than at draft-time. If this recurs, the fix is checker validating cross-proposal consistency within a trail before staging, not just before applying.
